exort.message.debug_storage_invalid: UUID tlapialoni oso itoka maseuali amo kuali.

exort.message.usage_debug_storage: xiktlapo tlapialoni ika id oso saniman de maseuali
exort.message.usage_debug_cache: xikitta cache tlapialoni uan ilpikayotl network omamali
exort.message.usage_give_items: Items: storage_core, terminal, crafting_terminal, monitor, import_bus, export_bus, wire, wireless_terminal
exort.message.debug_load_usage: Tlatki: /exort debug benchmark start [players] [seconds] | /exort debug benchmark stop
exort.message.debug_load_started: Load test opeu para %1$s maseualtin simulated.
exort.message.debug_load_verdict: Tlatol load test: %1$s (TPS min %2$s, max %3$s, avg %4$s, p1 %5$s; MSPT min %6$s, max %7$s, avg %8$s, p95 %9$s, p99 %10$s)
exort.message.debug_load_rare_stalls: Stalls amo momostla: %1$s sample itlampa TPS 12, min %2$s.
exort.message.debug_load_summary: Modelo benchmark: players %1$s, chunks %2$s, storages/chunk %3$s, buses/chunk %4$s, monitors/chunk %5$s, est ops/tick %6$s (global %7$s, chunk %8$s), db/tick %9$s, monitor updates %10$s/t%11$s, wire %12$s/%13$s miss %14$s%% cover %15$s%%, measured window %16$ss after setup (min warmup %17$ss), jitter %18$s%%, guard players %19$s, guard entities %20$s/%21$s, guard churn %22$s/tick, world lanes %23$s, world ops/tick %24$s, world blocks %25$s, water-test wire length %26$s, water sources %27$s, water extra chunks %28$s
exort.message.debug_load_measurement_sta: Medicion benchmark opeu satepa setup uan water-flow omoquetz.
exort.message.debug_load_hints: Tlapaleuil benchmark synthetic: dominant %1$s; CPU %2$s%%, WIRE %3$s%%, DISPLAYS %4$s%%, DB %5$s%%, WIRELESS %6$s%%, GUARDS %7$s%%, WORLD %8$s%% (placements %9$s).
exort.message.debug_load_metadata: Metadata benchmark: server %1$s, Exort %2$s, Java %3$s, plugins %4$s.
exort.message.debug_load_recent_runs: Benchmark okachi (%1$s): TPS avg %2$s, MSPT avg %3$s, MSPT p95 %4$s.
exort.message.debug_load_move_away: Ximolini %1$s chunks uejka de Exort blocks oso xikseui benchmark.simulateDisplays.
exort.message.debug_cache_mode_invalid: Modo cache verbose amo ixmatki: %1$s. Xiktekiui compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_worldedit_mode_inval: Modo debug WorldEdit amo kuali: %1$s. Xiktekiui compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_pick_mode_invalid: Modo pick verbose amo kuali: %1$s. Xiktekiui compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_culling_mode_invalid: Modo display culling verbose amo kuali: %1$s. Xiktekiui compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_culling_client_inval: Maseuali amo ixmatki para culling client bypass: %1$s.
exort.message.debug_culling_client_statu: Client culling bypass para %1$s: manual=%2$s, auto=%3$s, source=%4$s, effective=%5$s, config=%6$s. Client probe: %7$s.
exort.message.debug_cache_status_evict: Evict: eligible=%1$s idleMs=%2$s/%3$s dirty=%4$s viewers=%5$s loading=%6$s
exort.message.debug_cache_status_marker_: Storage marker amo monexti ipan chunks omamali (chunk aso amo loaded).
exort.message.debug_cache_status_chunk: Chunk: loaded=%1$s level=%2$s forceLoaded=%3$s pluginTickets=%4$s players=%5$s

Amo terminals/monitors/buses omamali mopiloa ika nin tlapialoni.
exort.message.version: Exort Storage Network v%1$s ika phantomfighterxx
exort.message.usage_mode_info: xiknexti modo config uan modo effective
exort.message.usage_resourcepack_rebuild: xikchijchiua okseppa uan reload pack pipeline

exort.message.mode_fix_paper_missing: Amo huel motlapoa RESOURCE mode: amo monexti Paper config file ipan %1$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_error: Amo huel motlapoa RESOURCE mode: amo huel mopoua oso moyankuilia %1$s: %2$s. Xiktlali %3$s: true itech nin file uan restart server.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_access_deni: Amo huel motlapoa RESOURCE mode: Exort amo huel kijkuiloa %1$s. Xikitta file permissions, oso xiktlali %2$s: true uan restart server.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_restart_req: Paper config kipia %1$s: true itech %2$s, pero Paper runtime okachi kinekis restart.
exort.message.mode_fix_exort_changed: Exort config omoyankuili: mode omotlali RESOURCE.
exort.message.mode_blocked: Amo huel motlapoa RESOURCE: Paper's block-updates.disable-chorus-plant-updates amo otlapok.
exort.message.pack_sent_all: Solicitud resource pack omotitlani ika %1$s maseualtin.
exort.message.pack_status.provider_note: Resource-pack handoff yektok para %1$s; provider kitlalia ipan startup/pack generation. Tla %1$s yeka otlapok, xirestart oso xireload in provider manual.
exort.message.resource_pack.required_fai: Resource pack Exort moneki omoketz. Xikalaki okseppa uan xikkaua.
